item.title: Prince Louis Shows Off His Sporty Side in Beachy Birthday Video: '8 Is Great!'
item.description: The young royal played cricket, jumped into the sea and ran fast in the footage filmed during a family vacation in Cornwall

item.title: How Did Hulk Hogan Die? Inside the WWE Star's Quiet Health Struggles at the End of His Life
item.description: Twelve-time world champion wrestler Hulk Hogan died in July 2025

item.title: Where Is Brooke Hogan’s Ex-Boyfriend Yannique Barker Now? Inside His Life Today
item.description: Yannique Barker was the subject of racist comments from Brooke's dad, Hulk Hogan, which were leaked in 2015

item.title: How Tall Are Your Favorite Celebrities? Learn the Surprising Heights of These 30 Stars
item.description: From Dwayne Johnson to Taylor Swift to Simone Biles, find out how tall many actors, musicians and athletes are — and what some have said about their s...
